scripts.serve: node ./scripts/sync-to-supabase.mjs && npx supabase functions serve --workdir .. --env-file functions/.env.local
scripts.logs:user-created-notify:staging: bash -lc 'PROJECT_REF=${PROJECT_ID:-$(grep -E "^PROJECT_ID=" .env.staging | tail -n 1 | cut -d= -f2)}; if [ -z "$PROJECT_REF" ]; then PROJECT_REF=${SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF:-$(grep -E "^SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF=" .env.staging | tail -n 1 | cut -d= -f2)}; fi; if [ -z "$PROJECT_REF" ]; then PROJECT_REF=$(cat ../supabase/.temp/project-ref 2>/dev/null || true); fi; npx supabase functions logs --workdir .. --project-ref "$PROJECT_REF" user-created-notify --follow'
